name: Data.Dumper

values.name: dumpMaybe
values.comment: Dump a Maybe a in HTML.
values.type: (a -> Html msg) -> Maybe a -> Html msg

values.name: dumpNestedRecord
values.comment: Dump a nested record in HTML. It is a hack: you have to provide the depth of the record.
values.type: Int -> List ( String, a -> Html msg ) -> a -> Html msg

values.name: dumpRecord
values.type: String -> List ( String, a -> Html msg ) -> a -> Html msg

values.name: dumpUnion
values.type: String -> ( String, Html msg ) -> Html msg
